mapper.sql: c.contract_id, c.contract_no, c.student_id, s.student_name, s.lead_mentor_id, coalesce(u.nick_name, cast(s.lead_mentor_id as char)) as lead_mentor_name, c.contract_type, c.contract_amount, c.total_hours, c.used_hours, c.remaining_hours, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.renewal_reason, c.contract_status, c.attachment_path, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark

where.if: and ( s.student_name like concat('%', #{studentName}, '%') or cast(c.student_id as char) like concat('%', #{studentName}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select
from osg_contract c left join osg_student s on c.student_id = s.student_id left join sys_user u on s.lead_mentor_id = u.user_id
order by c.contract_id desc

select count(*) as totalContracts, sum(case when c.contract_status = 'active' then 1 else 0 end) as activeContracts, sum(case when c.contract_status = 'active' and c.end_date between curdate() and date_add(curdate(), interval 30 day) then 1 else 0 end) as expiringContracts, sum(case when c.contract_status in ('expired', 'cancelled') or c.end_date < curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as endedContracts, coalesce(sum(c.contract_amount), 0) as totalAmount, coalesce(sum(c.total_hours), 0) as totalHours, 0 as usedHours, coalesce(sum(c.remaining_hours), 0) as remainingHours from osg_contract c left join osg_student s on c.student_id = s.student_id
mapper.insert:
insert into osg_contract
contract_no, student_id, contract_type, contract_amount, total_hours, used_hours, remaining_hours, start_date, end_date, renewal_reason, contract_status, attachment_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{contractNo}, #{studentId}, #{contractType}, #{contractAmount}, #{totalHours}, #{usedHours}, #{remainingHours}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{renewalReason}, #{contractStatus}, #{attachmentPath}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.update: update osg_contract set attachment_path = #{attachmentPath}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where contract_id = #{contractId}
